stemHtml:
Which of the following statements about a yaw damper system are correct? Select the correct combination.

1. Yaw damper is part of the autopilot yaw channel
2. Yaw dampers can participate in turn coordination
3. Yaw damper acts parallel and upstream of rudder pedals
4. Rudder moves independently from rudder pedals
5. For given oscillation speed the signal sent to the rudder is proportional to the airspeed
